title: 174: Pacific Rim
summary: For six years, Sophos fought a secret cyber war against a state-backed hacking group targeting its firewalls. This forced Sophos to drastically change tactics to properly secure their firewalls. Was it ethical? Was it effective? They disrupted nine zero-day attacks, exposed who was hacking them, and forced the hackers to change tactics. But at what cost? summary: Deviant Ollam is a physical penetration specialist. That means he’s paid to break into buildings to see if the building is secure or not.
